tweets.full_text:
turkey does have multiple players whos ideal shooting position is out of the box, so i dont think its terrible "high quality" xg, they just happened to go wide

unfortunate cus these results are going to be a further downgrade the already dying trend of long shots, coaches and math models really hate players shooting out of the box already

but if am the turkey coach id also have told calhanoglu or guler to just send it if they have the space to shoot, theres not much else going for this squad lmeow

yildiz is an amazing player tho, really like him
